mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s JOIN dict_metric m ON s.metric_id = m.id WHERE m.metric_name = '总教师数' AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s JOIN dict_metric m ON s.metric_id = m.id WHERE m.metric_name = '专任教师数' AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s WHERE s.metric_id = #{metricId} AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s WHERE s.metric_id = #{metricId} AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
